iteration_1_baseline.notes: Baseline with unmodified skill. power-flow passed all criteria. economic-dispatch: within-limits=0 despite correct values.

iteration_2_js_examples.notes: Switched to JavaScript examples. Regression: model used broken inline node script for dispatch (output-exists=0). Power-flow angles not in radians.

iteration_3_python_restored.notes: Restored Python examples. economic-dispatch recovered. Power-flow still failing angles-reasonable (no per-unit conversion).

iteration_4_perunit_conversion.notes: Added explicit per-unit conversion guidance (S_base=100). Power-flow now passes all criteria. economic-dispatch within-limits still fails.

iteration_5_final_validation.notes: Final validation confirms stable scores. within-limits failure verified as benchmark infrastructure issue (test passes manually with identical data).

changes_made: Added explicit per-unit conversion guidance: reactances are per-unit on 100 MVA base, loads in MW, must divide by S_base=100 before solving
Added S_base=100 to Python code example with P_pu = P_mw / S_base conversion
Added line flow MW conversion: multiply per-unit flow by S_base
Added common mistake entry for angles too large (forgot per-unit conversion)
Kept Python examples (JavaScript inline scripts failed for gemini-3-flash)
Made algorithm steps more explicit and numbered
